name: Half Shell Raw Bar"hot Lips
recipeInstructions:
1. Stem and halve the jalapenos, removing seeds.
2. Cut cream cheese into 24 pieces and press one piece onto each jalapeno half.
3. Coat peppers with flour, then dip in buttermilk for about 1 minute.
4. Roll peppers in bread crumbs, place in refrigerator for 10 minutes.
5. Heat oil in a heavy skillet over high heat until very hot but not smoking.
6. Carefully slide prepared jalapenos into the oil and fry for 40 seconds or until golden brown and crispy (work in batches).
7. Remove with slotted spoon, pat dry with paper towels.
8. Serve hot with ranch dressing and tortilla chips.
Nutritional information per serving: 63 calories; .9g protein; 6.4g carbohydrates; 3.8g fat (54%).
